purpose: Require explicit mathematical data before any R1/R2/R3 accuracy or closure-readiness score can be computed.

R1_LONG_CHORD_EXCLUSION.formal_statement: For each supplied finite skeleton graph S=(V,E_skel), candidate chord set C, and threshold lambda, no candidate chord {u,v} is a long chord when every computed skeleton distance d_S(u,v) is strictly below lambda.
R1_LONG_CHORD_EXCLUSION.domain: finite simple undirected graph packets with explicit skeleton edges, candidate chords, and integer path metric
invariants: candidate endpoints are connected in the skeleton graph
computed distances match the packet values
R1_LONG_CHORD_EXCLUSION.boundary: finite computable data packet only; no general LongChordExclusion proof

R2_DIAMETER_SEPARATION_FILLING_OBSTRUCTI.formal_statement: For each supplied finite connected graph packet with terminal pairs, diameter bound D, separation threshold sigma, and filling floor phi, the R2 obstruction is present when graph diameter is at most D, every terminal distance is at least sigma, and every filling certificate has size strictly greater than phi.
R2_DIAMETER_SEPARATION_FILLING_OBSTRUCTI.domain: finite simple connected undirected graph packets with terminal pairs, diameter bound, separation threshold, and filling certificates
objects: filling certificates indexed by terminal pair
invariants: filling certificates use only existing graph edges
computed diameter and distances match packet values

finite_witness_schema.separation_function: BFS graph distance on terminal pairs
finite_witness_schema.forbidden_filling_predicate: diameter <= D and terminal distances >= sigma and filling sizes > phi

R2_DIAMETER_SEPARATION_FILLING_OBSTRUCTI.boundary: finite computable data packet only; no general DiameterSeparationFillingObstruction proof

R3_UNIFORM_LOCAL_TYPE_CAPACITY.formal_statement: For each supplied finite labeled graph packet with radius r and capacity bound K, the R3 capacity instance is present when the number of distinct computed radius-r local type signatures is at most K.
R3_UNIFORM_LOCAL_TYPE_CAPACITY.domain: finite simple undirected labeled graph packets with explicit radius, finite type alphabet, vertex labels, and capacity bound
objects: vertex label function ell : V -> Alphabet
invariants: every vertex has exactly one label
labels lie in the supplied type alphabet
local type radius is a nonnegative integer
capacity bound is a positive integer

finite_witness_schema.uniformity_quantifier: for every vertex v in V, local_type_signature(v,r) belongs to a type set of size <= K

R3_UNIFORM_LOCAL_TYPE_CAPACITY.boundary: finite computable data packet only; no general UniformLocalTypeCapacity proof
